characters.name: Maya Patel
characters.appearance: Maya has short, dark hair and expressive brown eyes. She wears a sleek white and silver spacesuit with a gold badge on her chest, bearing the insignia of the Mars Colonization Mission. Her suit is equipped with a life support system, communication device, and various tools for sampling and exploration.
characters.reference_style: Concept art by Syd Mead, with a mix of futuristic and industrial elements

characters.name: Dr. Liam Chen
characters.appearance: Dr. Chen has a kind face with a wispy beard and glasses perched on the end of his nose. He wears a simple white lab coat over a blue shirt and khaki pants, with a pocket protector filled with pens and a notebook.
characters.reference_style: Inspired by the character designs of Pixar's 'WALL-E'

characters.name: Mission Control Voice
characters.appearance: No visual appearance, only a voice
characters.reference_style: Inspired by the Mission Control voices from NASA's Apollo missions

characters.name: Ava Morales
characters.appearance: Ava has curly brown hair and a bright smile, with a few tattoos on her arms and a scar above her left eyebrow. She wears a pair of goggles on her forehead and a tool belt around her waist, with a Mars Colonization Mission patch on her sleeve.
characters.reference_style: Inspired by the character designs of 'The Martian'
